data.text: PROFILE OF Oluwaseyi Obabunmi ADETOLA, Esq.
Oluwaseyi Obabunmi Adetola is a seasoned professional and currently serves as the Divisional Head, Legal & Regulatory Compliance of First Registrars & Investor Services Limited.

He boasts extensive experience in Investment Banking, Management, Accounting, Legal Matters, Capital Market Operations, Facility Management, Leadership, Human Capital Management, and Property Management.

Higher National Diploma (HND) in Accountancy, Akwa Ibom State Polytechnic, Akwa-Ibom State. Post-Graduate Diploma in Financial Management (PGD). Bachelor of Laws (LL.B), Olabisi Onabanjo University, Ago-Iwoye, Ogun State. Barrister at Law (BL), Nigerian Law School/Council of Legal Education/Body of Benchers. Fellow of the Institute of Capital Market Registrars (FICMR); Fellow of the Institute of Chartered Mediators and Conciliators (FICMC); Fellow of the Institute of Corporate Credit Management (FICCM); Fellow of the Nigerian Institute of Training and Development (FITD); Fellow of Chartered Institute of Education and Training, USA (FCIET). Accredited Trainer of Centre for Management Development (ATCMD); Member, Chartered Institute of Bankers of Nigeria; Associate of the Institute of Chartered Secretaries and Administrators (AICSAN); Associate of the Chartered Institute of Stockbrokers (ACIS).

Began his banking career in March 1985 at Union Bank of Nigeria Limited in the Registrars Department (1985-1994), then moved to Human Resources to drive training initiatives and helped establish the Consultancy Department to train staff in share registration. Worked with the Accenture Management Consultant Team during Union Bank’s staff reengineering process. Served as a trainer with the Management/Flexcube Training Team from India to prepare Union Bank Plc staff for the FLEXCUBE banking software conversion. Spent about 23 years with Union Bank before joining First Registrars Nigeria Limited in January 2009 as Head, Management Services Division, overseeing admin and general services, mailing, facility management, human capital management, planning, KYC, and training/performance management. He currently oversees Legal, Regulatory, and Compliance matters of First Registrars & Investor Services Ltd, reporting directly to the Managing Director/CEO.

Vice Chairman, Legal Committee Team, Institute of Capital Market Registrars. Management Member, Education and Training Committee, Institute of Capital Market Registrars. Award Winner, First Bank's Subsidiary Best Staff of the Year under the Chief-Executive Annual Merit Award (CAMA) 2011/2012. Participant in various leadership, management, and governance training programs.

Oluwaseyi was born on 7 June 1965 into a Christian family. He is committed to a devoted Christian life, known for integrity and sterling qualities, and is married to Modupe Senayan Bolanle with three young adults.
